notes: Gold set regenerated for the current test_records/ corpus: 26 air-defence records, modelIDs 1001-1025 plus exemplar 000000. Retrieval expected_rids are ANY-OF unless required_rids is present (ALL required, for comparisons). expected_filter uses the generated catalogue fields from a fresh test_records ingest.

cases.query: What is the F-22 Raptor?
cases.notes: Lockheed Martin F-22 Raptor, modelID 1001.

cases.query: Tell me about the AIM-120 AMRAAM.
cases.notes: AIM-120 AMRAAM, modelID 1002.

cases.query: What is the AN/APG-77 radar?
cases.notes: AN/APG-77 Radar, modelID 1003, platform F-22 Raptor.

cases.query: What is the F-35 Lightning II?
cases.notes: Lockheed Martin F-35 Lightning II, modelID 1004.

cases.query: Tell me about the Su-57 Felon.
cases.notes: Sukhoi Su-57, modelID 1005, alias Felon.

cases.query: What is the S-400 Triumf?
cases.notes: S-400 Triumf, modelID 1010.

cases.query: Tell me about NASAMS.
cases.notes: NASAMS, modelID 1021.

cases.query: What is the SPYDER air-defense system?
cases.notes: SPYDER, modelID 1025.

cases.query: What is the maximum range of the AIM-120 AMRAAM?
cases.notes: AIM-120 AMRAAM Maximum range variants include 105 km and 180 km.

cases.query: What is the detection range of the AN/APG-77 radar?
cases.notes: AN/APG-77 Detection range variants include 193 km and 400 km.

cases.query: What is the maximum range of the S-400 Triumf?
cases.notes: S-400 Triumf Maximum range variants include 400 km, 250 km, and 120 km.

cases.query: How long does NASAMS take to deploy?
cases.notes: NASAMS Deployment time is 10 min.

cases.query: What is the service ceiling of the Su-57?
cases.notes: Sukhoi Su-57 Service ceiling is 20000 m.

cases.query: What is the unit cost of the Eurofighter Typhoon?
cases.notes: Eurofighter Typhoon Unit cost is 95000000 USD.

cases.query: Compare the F-22 Raptor and the F-35 Lightning II.
cases.notes: Requires both current US fighter records in context.

cases.query: Which radar has the greater detection range, the AN/APG-77 or the AN/APG-81?
cases.notes: AN/APG-77 Detection range reaches 400 km; AN/APG-81 reaches 215 km.

cases.query: Compare the S-300 and S-400 air-defense systems.
cases.notes: Requires both S-300 and S-400 system records.

cases.query: Which missile has greater maximum range, Python-5 or Derby?
cases.notes: Python-5 Maximum range is 20 km; Derby Maximum range is 50 km.

cases.query: Which fighter aircraft entered service after 2010?
cases.notes: Among Fighter Aircraft records with serviceEntryYear, Su-57 is 2020; F-22 and Eurofighter are 2005/2003. F-35 lacks derived serviceEntryYear in this corpus.

cases.query: Which surface-to-air missile systems have a maximum range of at least 100 km?
cases.notes: S-400 and S-300 exceed 100 km as system records; NASAMS and SPYDER are below 100 km.

cases.query: List air defense radars with detection range over 300 km.
cases.notes: 91N6E and 92N6E have Detection range 340 km; 64N6E and 96L6E are exactly 300 km and should not satisfy a strict over-300 query.

cases.query: Which Russian anti-aircraft missiles have maximum range above 100 km?
cases.notes: 40N6, 48N6M, 9M96 and 9M96DM are Russian anti-aircraft missiles with ranges over 100 km.

cases.query: Which systems are operated by India?
cases.notes: Exercises the multi-value proliferation adapter for India operators.

cases.query: Which in-production missiles cost less than $500,000 per unit?
cases.notes: AIM-9X Sidewinder is an in-production missile with Unit cost 280000 USD; AIM-120 is higher.

cases.query: Which aircraft radars are fitted to the F-35 Lightning II?
cases.notes: AN/APG-81 Radar has Platform F-35 Lightning II and relation to the F-35 record.

cases.query: Which records have projected fielding status?
cases.notes: Su-57 and the exemplar record carry Fielding status Projected.

cases.query: Why is the F-22 Raptor associated with stealth and supercruise?
cases.notes: Targets F-22 descriptive prose and parameters around stealth/air-superiority role and supercruise.

cases.query: How does the AIM-120 AMRAAM guide itself to a target?
cases.notes: Targets AIM-120 guidance prose/parameter: inertial navigation, datalink mid-course update, active radar terminal homing.

cases.query: What role do Big Bird radars play in the S-300 and S-400 families?
cases.notes: Targets the 91N6E and 64N6E Big Bird surveillance/acquisition radar records.

cases.query: What missiles does NASAMS employ?
cases.notes: Targets NASAMS prose/parametric evidence for AIM-120, AIM-9 Sidewinder and AMRAAM-ER.

cases.query: What is the crew complement of the B-2 Spirit bomber?
cases.notes: No B-2 Spirit record exists in the current air-defence corpus.

cases.query: What is the effective range of the Iron Dome air defense system?
cases.notes: No Iron Dome record exists in the current air-defence corpus.
